# Development Roadmap

## Overview

A plan that uses the English-word heading variant '## Risks and Mitigations'
rather than the ampersand form.  G2.no_risks must not fire for this variant.

## Risks and Mitigations

| Risk | Severity | Mitigation |
|------|----------|------------|
| Integration delay | High | Weekly sync with partner team |
| Budget overrun | Medium | Monthly cost review |
